# Examples: benchmarking skill
This file collects usage examples, CLI invocations, and integration patterns for the benchmarking skill.
## Example 1: Run Benchmarking Script
- To benchmark similar projects and generate reports:
```sh
python scripts/benchmark-similar-projects.py --top 10 --output reports/benchmark-similar-projects.md
```
## Example 2: Custom Weights
- Adjust rubric weights in the script or via CLI arguments to focus on specific criteria.

Add more examples as new tools or scripts are integrated with this skill.
